LBE.definition: LBE stands for Language-Based Entity Extraction, a technique used in natural language processing to identify and extract entities from text.

NeoCortex.definition: The NeoCortex is a complex neural network model used in AI agent frameworks to simulate human cognitive functions.

MCP.definition: MCP stands for Multi-Criteria Planning and is a component in an AI agent framework designed to optimize decision-making processes based on multiple criteria.

neocortex_config.definition: The neocortex_config is a configuration file used in an AI agent framework to define the architecture and parameters of the neural network that powers the agent.

API.definition: API stands for Application Programming Interface, which is a set of rules and protocols that allows different software applications to communicate with each other.
